case_title: VULCAN THREADED PRODUCTS VS MBR SYATEMS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VULCAN THREADED PRODUCTS AS TO DEFENDANT MBR SYATEMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MBR SYATEMS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VULCAN THREADED PRODUCTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MBR SYATEMS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,008.00, BASED ON 2 BOUNCED CHECKS FOR $2500.00 EACH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
